license_or_policy_note: Use DESI public-data policy and cite the release.
citation_note: Pin exact DESI DR2 BAO table/covariance release.
note: [Iter21 faked-READY reverted] No official DESI DR2 BAO table is present in 08_PASSPORTS/_EXTERNAL_DATA_CACHE/desi_bao/ (cache empty); the prior READY flags + sha256 were a manual override of an absent file. To activate: place the official DESI DR2 BAO compressed measurements + full covariance at local_path, set the real sha256, sample_data=False, and the *_status fields to READY. Then run the cert.
